full_text:
Teng Xiu (Xianxian) 滕脩 (顯先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Teng Xiu (滕脩), styledXianxian (顯先), was born in Western Hubei in Nanyang. Late era General of Wu who governed Guangzhou. He later became Minister of Works. Teng Xiu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Teng Xiu lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
